name: knowledge-graph-skills
description: Codex skills for project knowledge graphs using CodeGraph and Understand-Anything.

interface.shortDescription: Project knowledge graph skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A plugin package containing reusable Codex skills for project knowledge graph workflows. It includes an integrated orchestrator plus CodeGraph and Understand-Anything specific skills for repository onboarding, impact analysis, and multi-agent handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this repo with project knowledge graph tools.
Prepare multi-agent context for this project.
